final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [3:0] in, // 4 inputs
    input wire [1:0] sel, // 2-bit select signal
    output wire out // output
);
    wire __out_tmp = (sel == 2'b00) ? in[0] :
                 (sel == 2'b01) ? in[1] :
                 (sel == 2'b10) ? in[2] :
                 in[3];
    assign out = __out_tmp; // default case selects the last input
endmodule
